_meta.description: GENERALIZED PLACEHOLDER (sanitized showcase). The real file is a curated list of high-precision discovery seeds for the target ICP. The technique: unlike generic web search (~30-40% precision), a good seed is a page that both lists real third-party companies AND links OUT to each company's own domain in static HTML. curated_discovery.py harvests those outbound domains, then the normal scrape + verify + ICP-filter pipeline takes over. The concrete validated source URLs, per-source yields, and operator sourcing strategy have been removed from this public copy; only the file SHAPE and a few illustrative example entries remain so the code still parses and runs.

seed_selection_notes.concept: Enrichment means carving NEW, precise discovery tunnels so successive passes stop bumping into the same companies. The productive seams are association member rosters, directory index pages, and trade-show exhibitor lists that expose per-company website links in STATIC HTML.
seed_selection_notes.keep_rule: Only keep a seed if it exposes >= 8 distinct OUTBOUND company domains in static HTML.
seed_selection_notes.reject_rule: Reject JS-rendered app-shell directories and internal-profile-only pages that never link out to a company's own domain.
seed_selection_notes.geo_gate: Country-aware: reads cctld_by_country from scoring config; the curated path is not region-locked.

trade_shows.name: Example Lab & Diagnostics Expo
trade_shows.note: exhibitor directory with per-company outbound links
